metadata.name: Respond to Proposed Trust Fund Recovery Penalty

description: A business owner is being held personally liable for unpaid payroll taxes (Trust Fund Recovery Penalty). They need to respond.

nodes.task_description: Review the case to determine if the owner was a 'responsible person' and if the failure to pay was 'willful'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent analyzes the facts against the legal standards for the penalty.

nodes.task_description: Gather evidence to support the owner's defense (e.g., they had no control over finances).

expected_outcome.value: Agent compiles relevant documents and testimony.

nodes.task_description: Prepare a formal protest to appeal the proposed penalty.

expected_outcome.value: Agent drafts and files an appeal to dispute the penalty assessment.
